summary: Comprehensive testing of Inventory ↔ Sales Order Integration feature. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI tests passed via Playwright - verified Sales Dashboard, Document Detail with CreateBCSalesOrderPanel, and Inventory Ledger page with workspace balances.

issues: Minor console warnings about HTML nesting: <tr> inside <span> and <span> inside <tbody> - these are React DevTools/hydration warnings from dynamic list rendering but don't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns inventory_summary with lines_matched, lines_short, lines_no_match
Backend: POST /api/gpi-integration/sales-orders/preflight/{doc_id} - returns inventory_workspace with id, name, code, negative_balance_policy
Backend: Preflight resolved_lines contain 'inventory' field with status (OK/LOW/SHORT/NO_MATCH)
Backend: When no workspace matches, inventory_summary contains available_workspaces list
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers - returns customer workspaces with policy badges
Backend: POST /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/movements - creates order_commitment movements
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/customers/{id}/balances - derives balances with available = on_hand + incoming - committed
Backend: GET /api/inventory-ledger/meta - returns valid movement_types including order_commitment
Frontend: Login with admin/admin works correctly
Frontend: Sales Dashboard renders document list with columns (STATUS, CUSTOMER, PO/EXT DOC, FILE, AMOUNT, LINES, DATE, INFO, ACTION)
Frontend: Document Detail page renders CreateBCSalesOrderPanel with Environment Banner (Read: Production, Write: Sandbox)
Frontend: Click 'Check Readiness' triggers preflight and shows DOCUMENT SUMMARY, VALIDATION CHECKLIST sections
Frontend: CUSTOMER INVENTORY section shows 'No inventory workspace matched' with available workspaces list when no match
Frontend: Line Preview table shows columns: Type, Description, Target, Qty, Price, Total, **Avail**, **Inv** (inventory columns present)
Frontend: Inventory status badges show '—' (NO_MATCH) when no workspace matched
Frontend: Order Total in footer aligned correctly with colSpan={5} + total value + colSpan={3}
Frontend: Inventory Ledger page shows customer selector cards with name, code, policy badges
Frontend: Click customer card opens workspace with summary strip (7 Items Tracked, 2,160 On Hand, 300 Incoming, 6,324 Committed, 3 Shortages)
Frontend: Balance table shows ITEM, WAREHOUSE, OWNERSHIP, ON HAND, INCOMING, COMMITTED, AVAILABLE, UOM, STATUS columns
Frontend: Status badges (SHORT/OK) render correctly with appropriate colors (red for SHORT, green for OK)
seed_data_used: Hormel Foods workspace with items: SPAM-12OZ (600 OH, 300 IN, 200 CM = 700 AV), SPAM-LITE (200 OH, 999 CM = -799 AV SHORT), DINTY-150Z (1000 OH = OK). Karlin Foods workspace with block_commitment policy.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inventory ↔ Sales Order Integration testing complete. Key integration points: (1) resolve_inventory_workspace matches customer_no/name to inventory workspace, (2) enrich_lines_with_inventory adds inventory field to each SO line with status/available/matched, (3) preflight response includes inventory_summary (lines_matched, lines_short, lines_no_match) and inventory_workspace (id, name, code, policy), (4) Frontend shows CUSTOMER INVENTORY section and Avail/Inv columns in line table. Email service is MOCKED. BC API calls may timeout in preview env due to auth - expected behavior.

backend.preflight_inventory_lookup: Resolves workspace by customer_no/name, enriches lines with inventory data
backend.inventory_summary_in_preflight: Returns lines_matched, lines_short, lines_no_match, total_lines, match_method
backend.inventory_workspace_in_preflight: Returns id, name, code, negative_balance_policy when matched
backend.line_level_inventory: Each resolved_line has inventory field with status (OK/LOW/SHORT/NO_MATCH), available, on_hand, committed
backend.order_commitment_creation: create_order_commitments function creates movements on SO creation (idempotent)

frontend.sales_dashboard: Document list with status badges, customer names, amounts, dates, action buttons (View/Review)
frontend.document_detail_preflight: CreateBCSalesOrderPanel with Environment Banner, Document Summary, Validation Checklist, Customer Inventory section
frontend.inventory_columns: Avail and Inv columns in line table showing available qty and status badges
frontend.inventory_ledger_page: Customer selector cards, workspace summary strip, balance table with status badges, tabs for Balances/Movements/Incoming
